title: Yajamana

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura, consumed by worry for his sons, resolves to confront Lord Shiva in a desperate attempt to save them. However, Lord Shiva, wielding his divine powers, takes action by launching Tarakasura's sons into space and arranging them as targets.
